name: Halloween Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
2. Divide the thawed dough in half and roll each half into circles about 10-12 inches in diameter on a lightly floured baking sheet.
3. Turn up the edges by about 1/2 inch and pinch or pleat them.
4. Brush the circles with oil and sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
5. Mix together tomato sauce, onion, salt, oregano, and garlic powder.
6. Pour the mixture onto the pizza circles.
7. Top with cheddar cheese.
8. Decorate with overlapping pepperoni slices around the edge of the pizzas, olive slices for eyes, and green pepper strips for eyebrows, noses, and smiles.
9. Bake until the crust is brown, about 20-25 minutes (2 pizzas).
